nodes.itemHTML: • 8 gdb tricks you should know
• snappystars5.4k - Fast compression library (implementation in C++, native bindings to C).
• murmurstars2.1k - C implementation of MurMur Hashing. Public Domain
• dyadstars1.3k - Asynchronous networking library. MIT
• iniparserstars824 - Parser for .ini files. Expat
• pthreads - The POSIX thread library.
• xdr - External Data Representation; a standard for data serialization.
• CCAN - Modelled after Perl's CPAN, this is a big collection of C code that does stuff. The full list is here.
• gnulib - Collection of common GNU code.
• cinclude2dot - Graphs include dependencies in a C project using Graphviz. Any GNU GPL version (due to underspecification in the file)
• CMake - Tools for cross-platform building, testing, and packaging. 3-clause BSD
• Jam - Build system, designed to be easier than make. Understands C build rules implicitly. Jam License
• qmake - Build system included with the Qt Framework. GNU GPL3 with Qt Exception
• PCC - Venerable C compiler. Supports C99. Various free licenses
• TCC - Tiny C Compiler; a small, fast C compiler. Supports C99 (except complex types). GNU LGPL2.1
• lzo - Very fast data compression library. GNU GPL2.1
• brotlistars11.5k - Generic lossless compression algorithm based on LZ77, Huffman coding and 2nd order context modelling MIT
• GnuTLS - Secure communication library, implementing SSL, TLS and DTLS. GNU LGPL2.1 or later
• OpenSSL - Implementation of the SSL and TLS protocols, and also includes a cryptography library. Dual Licensed under the OpenSSL License and the SSLeay License
• libressl - Modernized fork of OpenSSL. Various Licenses
• PostgreSQL - Powerful object-relational database system. PostgreSQL licence
• UnQLite - Self-contained, serverless, zero-configuration, transactional NoSQL engine with a C interface. FreeBSD
• Cxref - Generates documentation of C programs in either LaTeX, HTML, RTF or SGML. GNU GPL2.1
• GTK-Doc - Tool for generating C documentation from annotated sources. Has support for the Autotools. GNU GPL2.1 (code) or GNU FDL1.1
• Anjuta DevStudio - The GNOME IDE. GNU GPL2.1
• Atom - Hackable text editor for the 21st century. MIT
• CodeLite - Cross-platform IDE. GNU GPL2.1
• Geany - Very small and fast IDE. GNU GPL2.1 or later
• KDevelop - The KDE IDE. GNU GPL2.1
• ChibiOS - RTOS with complete development environment (HAL, drivers, support files, and tools). Various Licenses
• Cygwin - Designed to emulate a POSIX-compatible environment extensively under Windows. Various Licenses
• MinGW-w64 - Minimalist environment for C development on Windows with 64 bit support. Various Licenses
• CPL - The Common Pipeline Library; a set of libraries designed to be a comprehensive, efficient and robust software toolkit. GNU GPL2.1
• GLib - Library of utility functions and structures, designed to be portable, efficient and powerful. GNU LGPL2.1
• GIO - Modern and easy-to-use VFS API. GNU LGPL2.1
• GObject - Object-oriented system and object model for C. GNU LGPL2.1
• libnihstars80 - Lightweight library of C functions and structures. GNU GPL2.1
• PBL - Large library of utilities, featuring data structures, among other things. GNU LGPL2.1 or later (library) or GNU GPL2.1 or later (test code)
• stbstars20.1k - Range of single-file libraries for C. Public Domain
• Corangestars1.5k - Game engine in pure C. FreeBSD
• Darkplaces - Modified version of the Quake2 engine. GNU GPL2.1
• Quakestars3.8k - The Quake engine. GNU GPL2.1
• Quake2stars2.2k - The Quake2 engine. GNU GPL2.1
• CSFML - Binding for SFML in C. zlib
• Cogl - GPU graphics and utilities API. Expat
• Clutter - UI library based on OpenGL. GNU LGPL2.1
• giflib - Library for reading and writing gif images. MIT
• hemanstars446 - Tiny library of image utilities dealing with height maps, normal maps, distance fields and the like. Expat
• libcacastars425 - ASCII renderer for terminal-based interfaces. WTFPLv2
• libimagequant - Small, portable library for high-quality conversion of RGBA images to 8-bit indexed colour images. FreeBSD
• libjpeg-turbo - Faster library for reading and writing JPEG files. Various Licenses
• libpng - The official PNG reference library. libpng license
• GTK+ - Cross-platform widget toolkit. GNU LGPL2.1
• IUP - Another cross-platform widget toolkit. Expat
• Tk - Basic widget toolkit. Part of Tcl/Tk. Tcl/Tk License
• XForms Toolkit - Widget toolkit designed for the XWindow system. GNU LGPL2.1
• nuklearstars13.5k - Single-header ANSI C gui library. Public Domain
• libuistars10.3k - Simple and portable (but not inflexible) GUI library. MIT
• libcrcstars359 - Multi platform CRC library. MIT
• Jansson - C library for encoding, decoding and manipulating JSON. Expat
• jsmn - Minimalistic JSON parser. Expat
• json-c - Library for working with JSON. Expat
• parsonstars1.1k - Lightweight JSON library written in C. MIT
• YAJL - Fast C JSON streaming parser library. ISC
• P99 - Suite of macros to implement advanced features like default function arguments, scope-bound resources, etc. (Requires C99) Q Public License
• dlmalloc - Doug Lea's malloc(3) implementation, useful for academic and research purposes. Public Domain
• FFMPEG - Complete, cross-platform solution to record, convert and stream audio and video. GNU LGPL2.1 or later or GNU GPL2.1 or later (some parts)
• GStreamer - Framework for audio and visual media. GNU LGPL2.1
• libsoup - GNOME HTTP client/server library. Uses GObject. GNU LGPL2.1
• asnlc - Compiler of ASN.1 specifications into C source code. FreeBSD
• GnuTLS - Secure communication library, implementing SSL, TLS and DTLS. GNU LGPL2.1 or later
• http-parserstars6.1k - HTTP request/response parser. Expat
• libcurl - Client-side URL transfer library, supporting a wide range of formats. curl license
• libev - Yet another event loop. FreeBSD
• libmicrohttpd - Small C library that makes it easy to run an HTTP server as part of another application. GNU LGPL2.1 or later
• libvldmailstars47 - Your friendly e-mail address validation library. WTFPLv2
• nanomsgstars5.5k - C-based implementation of ZeroMQ. Expat
• OpenSSL - Implementation of the SSL and TLS protocols, and also includes a cryptography library. Dual Licensed under the OpenSSL License and the SSLeay License
• oSip - SIP implementation in C without additional dependencies. GNU LGPLv2.1 or later
• pigstars426 - Linux packet crafting tool. GPL2
• socket99stars133 - C99 wrapper for the BSD sockets API. ISC
• twitcstars25 - Mini C library for interacting with the Twitter OAuth API. Expat
• BLAS - Basic Linear Algebra Subprograms; a set of routines that provide vector and matrix operations. BLAS license
• FFTW - The Fastest Fourier Transform in the West; a highly-optimized fast Fourier transform routine. GNU GPL2.1 or later
• FLINT - Fast Library for Number Theory; a library supporting arithmetic with numbers, polynomials, power series and matrices, among others. GNU GPL2.1 or later
• PARI/GP - Computer algebra system for number theory; includes a compiler to C. GNU GPL2.1 or later
• cchan - Small library for channel constructs for inter-thread communication. Public Domain
• mill - Go-style concurrency in C. X11
• MPICH - Another implementation of MPI. MPICH licence
• TinyCThread - Portable, small implementation of the C11 threads API. zlib
• hammerstars267 - Parser combinators for binary formats. GNU GPL2.1
• mpcstars2.4k - Parser combinator library. FreeBSD
• libuclstars1.5k - Universal configuration library parser. FreeBSD
• SLREstars498 - Super Light Regular Expression library; a very small implementation of a subset of Perl regex syntax. GNU GPL2.1
• TREstars689 - POSIX-compliant, feature-full regex library. FreeBSD
• c-capnprotostars67 - Implementation of the Cap'n Proto serialization protocol. Expat
• cmpstars286 - Implementation of the MessagePack serialization protocol. Expat
• mpackstars405 - Another implementation of the MessagePack serialization protocol. Expat
• netstring-cstars4 - Netstring encoder and decoder. Public Domain
• protobuf-cstars2.2k - Implementation of Google Protocol Buffer in C. FreeBSD
• clibstars4.4k - Something of a package manager for C. Comes with a bunch of libraries of its own. Expat
• libdjb - Collection of libraries doing various things. (Apparently) Public Domain
• dietlibc - C standard library designed for the smallest possible binaries. GNU GPL2.1
• glibc - The GNU C Library; an implementation of the C standard library. GNU LGPL2.1
• musl - Standard C library, compatible with POSIX 2008 and C11. Designed for static linking. Expat
• ICU - International Components for Unicode; a library for Unicode support. ICU license
• SDSstars4k - Simple Dynamic Strings; a library for handling C strings in a simpler way, but one that is compatible with normal C string functions. Available via clibstars4.4k. FreeBSD
• CUnit - Another unit testing framework for C. GNU LGPL2.0
• Cuteststars18 - Library for unit testing with memory leak detection (Linux, freeBSD and Windows). GPL2
• minunitstars440 - Minimal unit testing framework for C. Expat
• munit - Small but full-featured unit testing framework for C with no dependencies. MIT
• linter-clangstars56 - Lint C code in Atom, using Clang. MIT
• linter-gccstars71 - Lint C code in Atom, using GCC. MIT
• Syntasticstars11.3k - Syntax checking and linting. Do What The Fuck You Want To license
• biicode - Modern dependency manager for C. Expat
• cstars2k - Compile and execute C "scripts" in one go on the command line. Also has shebang support. Expat
• c99shstars101 - Run C files using hash-bang. FreeBSD
• cdecl - Online service to translate C declarations into English and vice versa. Public Domain
• Glade - RAD tool to enable quick development of GTK+ GUIs. GNU GPL2.1
• tup - Very fast, file-based, cross-platform build system. GNU GPL2.1
• Valgrind - Range of dynamic analysis tools, including a leak checker. GNU GPL2.1
• ApeTagLibs - C library for working with APEv2 tags. Expat
• CExceptionstars250 - C implementation of exceptions. Expat
• docopt.cstars310 - C implementation of a command-line option parser. Expat
• dyncall - Another foreign function interface library. Expat
• FANN - Fast Artifical Neural Network library; an implementation of neural networks. GNU GPL2.1

• Firm - C library that provides a graph-based intermediate representation, optimizations and assembly code generation suitable for use in compilers. Comes with an example C front-end under the same license. GNU LGPLv2.1
• huffandpuffstars89 - Minimal Huffman encoder and decoder. Public Domain
• libffistars2.6k - Portable foreign-function interface library. Expat
• libimobiledevicestars5.2k - Cross-platform protocol library to communicate with iThings. GNU LGPLv2.1 or later (library) or GNU GPL2.1 or later (tools)
• nope.cstars693 - C-language-based, ultra-light software platform for scalable server-side and networking applications (think node.js for C programmers). GNU GPL2.1
• pbcstars1.6k - Protocol buffers library. Expat
• Ragel - DSL for state machines that compiles to C. GNU GPL2.1
• uthash - Hash table implementation, allowing existing structures to be stored in a hash table easily. 1-clause BSD
• libelfstars33 - ELF object file access library in C. GNU GPL2.1
• mcpp - Portable C preprocessor. 2-clause BSD
• Capstonestars5.9k - Dissasembly/disassembler framework. BSD 3-clause
• Expat - Stream-oriented XML parser. Expat
• libxml2 - Standards-compliant, portable XML parser. Expat
• AKASHA: A Next-Generation Social Media Network. Powered by the Ethereum world computer. Embedded into the Inter-Planetary File System.
• Patchworkstars3.6k: Decentralized messaging and sharing app built on top of Secure Scuttlebutt (SSB). Another alternative interface is Patchbaystars372.
• Syncthing-GTKstars1.1k: GUI for Syncthing - a continuous file synchronization program.

• Site Reliability Engineering: 4 Things to Know
• Wait… What Happens When my React Native Application Starts? — An In-depth Look Inside React Native

• Bistrostars3 is a light-weight engine for general-purpose data processing including both batch and stream analytics. It is based on a novel unique data model, which represents data via functions and processes data via columns operations as opposed to having only set operations in conventional approaches like MapReduce or SQL.
